description: Max cycles boundary tests — one under max (cycle 2 of 3), exactly at max (cycle 3 of 3), PASS at max cycle

one_under_max.description: At cycle 2 of 3, REVISE should return update (not fail)

exactly_at_max.description: At cycle 3 of 3, REVISE should return fail

pass_at_max.description: At cycle 3 of 3, PASS should still succeed (not blocked by cycle count)
